ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover as a percentage */,
  "events" TEXT /* Events (e.g., rain, snow, thunderstorm) */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "data_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type (e.g., Real-time, Historical) */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency (e.g., Hourly, Daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., severe storm, extreme temperature) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email addresses or contact information for recipients */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the weather data entry */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the weather data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_usage" TEXT /* Data usage statistics */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Trends and insights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)
